data.body: Agent 1 (Web Researcher) RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE=allowed-tools: (null YAML) fails loader type check expecting string or list. confidence=high. Fix: REMOVE the allowed-tools: line entirely from 29 SKILL.md files (field is optional; absence = all tools allowed). Sources: code.claude.com/docs/en/skills, GH issue #9817 (silent skill drop on bad frontmatter), official skill examples have NO allowed-tools field.
